LanguageData.PM_Sweeper.label: Sweeper
LanguageData.PM_Sweeper.description: A Sweeper is an entity whose body is made of Vital Fuel — a living, conscious matter — contained within a structural black suit. They do not eat, do not sleep, and do not bleed in the traditional sense. Instead, they must maintain their Vital Fuel level by absorbing organic matter. Perfectly adapted to darkness, they are vulnerable to intense light and piercing weapons, but resist impacts and blunt blows exceptionally well.
